texto: What will you do if I kiss you right now?""I'll kiss you back.""In what way? Sweet, soft, and slow like a first kiss? Or passionately and rude until I make you breathless?""Just do it on your own style.""Bad then. I've never kissed any woman before.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Yuli Pritania: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de limites e escolhas conscientes. O trecho “What will you do if I kiss you right now?""I'll kiss you back.""In what way? Sweet, soft, and slo…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que reflexao, kiss, right pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de reflexao.
